issues.description: Target should filter for {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type only, not all characters. Current scope 'AllOwnCharactersAndLeader' is overly broad.
Extraneous effect: DrawCard action with trigger 'Trigger' is not supported by card text. No draw effect is mentioned in the official text.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn' phrasing, but verify this aligns with intended game timing.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] All of your {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Leader and Character cards gain +1000 power during this turn.
